name: ralpharium
description: Ralpharium — the observable, controllable upgrade of the Ralph Loop. 8 specialized agents in shared memory, with a polished operator dashboard, RAM inspector, and continuous-loop runner. Local-first, no cloud auth required.

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');function rm(d){if(!fs.existsSync(d))return;for(const f of fs.readdirSync(d)){const fp=p.join(d,f);if(fs.statSync(fp).isDirectory()){if(f==='__pycache__'||f==='.ralph')fs.rmSync(fp,{recursive:true,force:true});else rm(fp);}}};rm('.');console.log('cleaned pycache + .ralph');"
